name: afterrealm
description: AfterRealm plugins for Claude Code. Time-aware agents, brutal code roasters, and web accessibility auditors.

plugins.name: father-time
plugins.description: Time-aware agent for Claude Code. Peak hour warnings, session tracking, daily briefings, rate limit forecasting, focus timers, and activity pattern learning.

plugins.name: blunt-cake
plugins.description: Brutal but brilliant code reviewer with the personality of a celebrity chef. 8 modes, 6 personalities, auto-fix, shareable roast cards. Real findings with real jokes.

plugins.name: curb-cut
plugins.description: Professional web accessibility auditor. Scans HTML, JSX, Vue, and Svelte for WCAG 2.2 Level AA violations with plain-English findings and concrete fixes.
